response.step_by_step_log: I identified two songs in the video. 1) 'soldier game' by μ's (Love Live! School Idol Project) starts at 00:00. 2) 'Mela!' by Ryokuoushoku Shakai starts at 01:54. I searched for these using the song title and artist name along with 'Japanese and English lyrics'. I found the lyrics for both and mapped them to the identified scenes. The interlude is a non-musical scene.
response.global_summary: A karaoke medley performed by virtual characters, featuring the songs 'soldier game' by μ's and 'Mela!' by Ryokuoushoku Shakai, with a brief interlude between the two performances.

scenes.description: Characters perform 'soldier game', with the song title visible in the top-left.

ここで登場
見てなさい 私の本気
スリルと美意識で勝つのよ必ず
優しげな言葉ささやく
偽の仮面…
It's soldier game
It's soldier game
今が勝負よ
私は誰でしょう
知りたくなったでしょう
ならば恋かも
私の中には秘密があるとして
それを君は
どうするの？
It's soldier game
また会えた時聞こうかな。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Three, two, one, zero!
Here I arrive
Watch me, this is my true self
I will definitely win, with thrills and aesthetic sensibility
Whispering gentle words
A fake persona...
It's soldier game
It's soldier game
Now it's a showdown!
Who am I?
You must be curious
Then it might be love
Assuming I have a secret inside me
What will you do?
It's soldier game
I'll ask when we meet again.
